title: ReviewerOutput
description: Output contract for the Reviewer agent. Every reviewer response must conform to this schema.

role_statement.description: Identifies this output as coming from the reviewer role.

task_id.description: Unique identifier for the task being reviewed.

verdict_justification.description: Human-readable explanation of why this verdict was chosen.

issues.description: List of issues found during review. Empty array if none.

file.description: File path where the issue was found.

line.description: Line number in the file, if applicable.

description.description: Clear description of the issue with evidence.

suggestion.description: Recommended fix or action, if applicable.

boundary_violations.description: List of files modified outside plan.in_scope.

symbol.description: The symbol or code path lacking test coverage.

reason.description: Why test coverage is needed for this path.

missing_tests.description: Changed code paths that lack test coverage.

definition_of_done_status.description: Verification status for each definition_of_done item.

blast_radius.description: Assessment of the downstream impact scope.

confidence.description: Reviewer confidence in the verdict. Must be >= 0.7 to avoid human escalation.

missing_checks.description: Checks that could not be performed. Empty array if all checks completed.

summary.description: Human-readable summary of the review, suitable for display to the requestor.
